original: The leader of the patrol in the camp carries intel I need. Take him out, search the camp for his GPS device and bring it to me as proof. (Without a boss mod, any patrol infected counts as the commander — with an active boss adapter, Integrations/Bosses.json maps a class name to the BossId camp_commander.)
english: The leader of the patrol in the camp carries intel I need. Take him out, search the camp for his GPS device and bring it to me as proof.
